messages.text: The silenced pistol is best where discretion is required
The shotgun destroys doors and other cover
Take the stairs or elevator up to the next floor
Aim the cursor with your mouse and Left Click to fire at the targets
Live enemies fight back, so be careful and eliminate the threat
Walk into doors to open them
Your weapon's ammo refills when you are not firing
Locked doors require you to have a key to pass, take mine
Enemies rely on line of sight and are also alerted to noise
Windows do not block line of sight ... or bullets
Some situations are made easier with the right weapon
Use WASD to move your character to the sign ahead
Missions are timed, grab time boosts to add 15 more seconds
Use rifle when the situation calls for range or piercing multiple enemies
Weapons and items are also found hiding under furniture
